title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
